\tzpentry{ID4780}{Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4780 introduces Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tT(t) = T_{\\text{env}} \\exp(-\\alpha t) \\implies T_{\\text{bath}} \\le 4.2 \\text{ K}\n\\end{equation}
